item.title: Bingo like you've never played before! Full of bad jokes, Strip Tease, AND prizes Lefty Lucy’s Burlesque Bingo is a whirlwind of wholesome good times blended with the cheeky sass of Burlesque!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-07-01T18:30:00.000-05:00 More info: burlesquebingonola.eventbrite.com Tickets: www.burlesquebingonola.eventbrite.com
LEFTY LUCY’S BURLESQUE BINGO features 3 rounds of Bingo with PRIZES EVERY ROUND — including a New Orleans Gift Set with a free shot, PLUS Lefty Lucy dances to a song the winner selects!
GRAND FINALE PRIZE from GLAM JAM plus gifts from local pop-ups!
But wait—there's more!
#EATLOCAL with a New Orleans/Korean Fusion pop-up from NOLA SNACK BAE offering delicious and unique dishes while you play!
This ain’t your Grandma’s Bingo —
but Grandma will love it!

item.title: The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal
item.description:
Venue: Poor Boys Starts: 2026-07-02T17:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: Comedy More info: https://www.facebook.com/share/14T5Mey6Nit/ Tickets: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/gumbolaya-the-magic-mic-tickets-1980178041828?aff=ebdsshcopyurl&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=listing&utm-source=cp
The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal limits welcome to bring your flavor! Sometimes there's prizes, sometimes there's positive surprises in the mix. There's always fun! It's free, but buy 2 drinks dammit! Pull up, turn up, laugh and savor the flavor of the authentic New Orleans experience! Sign up at 9 start at 9:30. See less

item.title: Mike "Dizzle" Jones Birthday Bash featuring MAC, Deezle, Young City, Roi Chip Anthony, Hasizzle The Voice, Hotboy Ronald, Alfred Banks, The Real Geno, Nas Got Next, Iris P, Chrisae, J9 Official
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-07-02T22:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.bluenilelive.com/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/mike-dizzle-jones-birthday-bash-blue-nile/
Free Entry with RSVP
Reserved Tables $125. FULL TABLE PURCHASE (4 tickets) IS REQUIRED.
VIP Area $400
Our VIP area includes booth seating for 6 and up to 8 with additional chairs. Direct access to Bar and beverage services. Includes one Bottle plus mixers. Equivalent beverage option can be arranged. Bottled water and sodas are complimentary. VIP Bottle Service Menu can be found here. To better serve you and your party please email bottle & mixer preferences prior to arrival to: info@bluenilelive.com Ability to rope off for additional privacy for your party.
"The Nook" Area $125
"The Nook" features booth seating accommodating up to four guests. Full area reservation is required.
All sales are final and refunds are only allowed in limited circumstances such as canceled events. If your event is canceled, postponed, rescheduled, or moved, we will attempt to contact you to update you on the status of the event, and inform you of any refund, credit, or exchange procedures.
All shows are for ages 21 and up. Valid ID required upon entry.

item.title: Experience the elegant world of Burlesque...with a TWIST. Champagne and Showgirls are waiting for you at The Allways Lounge & Cabaret!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge Starts: 2026-07-04T22:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: https://Burlesquewithatwist.eventbrite.com Tickets: https://Burlesquewithatwist.eventbrite.com
One of the most beloved Burlesque Shows in New Orleans!
Class: A Classic New Orleans Burlesque Show with a Twist is where you learn the true meaning of "Entertainment!"
Unforgettable, jaw-dropping performances! Dazzling Costumes! Champagne, and Showgirls!
Then after intermission, we turn up the heat, and reveal the twist!
Limited seating!
Get your tickets before they sell out!
Experience the elegant world of Burlesque at the Allways Lounge & Cabaret!
Doors 10pm, Show 10:30pm
Don't forget your dollar bills to throw on stage!!
www.Prettieboi.com for tickets
The Allways Lounge & Cabaret
This is a 21+ event
RSVP REQUIRED
NO REFUNDS
Prettieboishowcase@gmail.com

item.title: Grammy Award-Winning Irvin Mayfield's Music Church
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-07-09T21:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/
Irvin Mayfield is a Billboard and two-time Grammy Award- winning artist, composer, and producer. His 30+ record discography and published written works keynote three decades of world-tours, recorded performances, and collaborations with distinguished artists such as Stevie Wonder, Bob Weir, Frank Ocean, Aaron Neville, Wynton Marsalis, and Trombone Shorty.
A humanist born, raised, and presently residing in New Orleans, LA, Mayfield espouses a daily practice of constant reimagination in his community. His upcoming recording and live performance projects engage global thought leadership edging on the frontiers of art, media, technology and beauty.
9PM
Special Guests announced weekly.
Reserved Seating $25

item.title: Immerse yourself in a surreal evening of burlesque & performance art filled with untold delights, vibrant colors & outrageous acts!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-07-10T22:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: www.audaciousnola.com/tickets Tickets: https://PsychedelicSpeakeasyBurlesque.eventbrite.com
Audacious NOLA presents:
PSYCHEDELIC SPEAKEASY!
Immerse yourself in a surreal evening of burlesque and performance art filled with untold delights, vibrant colors, wild sensations and outrageous acts! Each month features a new cast and a new show in the Twilight Room at AllWays Lounge & Cabaret.
Colorful and neon attire is highly encouraged!
-Tipping highly encouraged
Doors 10pm, show 10:30pm
N﻿OTE FOR VIP TICKETS: Group parties reserving VIP tickets *must* purchase as a group under one single name in order to be seated together.
This is a 21+ event, ID required
RSVP REQUIRED
NO REFUNDS
hello@audaciousnola.com
www.audaciousnola.com

item.title: FREE monthly line dance classes at The Blue Crab! All skill levels welcome. Hip-hop, country, R&B, zydeco & NOLA classics. Just bring water & dancing spirit!
item.description:
Venue: The Blue Crab Starts: 2026-07-18T10:00:00.000-05:00 Ends: 2026-07-18T11:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: Theater, Stage & Dance More info: https://local.aarp.org/new-orleans-la/aarp-events/
Get your weekend started right with AARP Louisiana's "Movin' and Groovin'" - a free monthly outdoor line dance class at The Blue Crab's scenic lower patio! Perfect for all skill levels, these energetic sessions feature diverse music including hip-hop, country, R&B, zydeco, and New Orleans classics. No experience needed - bring comfortable clothes, water, and your dancing spirit! All ages welcome!
Please sign up here: https://local.aarp.org/new-orleans-la/aarp-events/
Address: 7900 Lakeshore Dr, New Orleans, LA 70124
Time: 10 am - 11 am
Dates:
-Saturday, September 20
-Saturday, October 18
-Saturday, November 15
-Saturday, December 20
-Third Saturday of the Month

item.title: Eight dancers accompanied by live and electronic compositions by Landon Strause and Sierra Carvalho investigates light, sound, and movement
item.description:
Venue: Marigny Opera House Starts: 2026-07-30T00:00:00.000-05:00 Ends: 2026-08-02T23:59:59.999-05:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/you-have-no-idea-how-far-ill-go-a-new-performance-by-calvin-rowe-tickets-1990490645102 Tickets: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/1990501699165
Thurs-Sun, July 30-Aug. 2, 2026
7:30PM Doors | 8:00PM Shows
A new performance by Calvin Rowe and DancersOriginal live and electronic score by Landon Strause and Sierra Carvalho
Performed by an ensemble of eight dancers and accompanied by an original live and electronic score, the premiere of You Have No Idea How Far I’ll Go is a haunting dance-noir exploration of light, sound, and movement. Inspired by the mythology of Orpheus’ journey into the underworld, choreographer Calvin Rowe creates an immersive contemporary dance experience that you don't want to miss.
Blending atmospheric electronic composition with live performance, this new work invites audiences into a world where myth and modern movement collide.
Featuring Performances ByCameron GibsonCullen BarrilleauxSierra CarvalhoMa'Kayla ParkerNatalie SunseriLeah LogsdonArden McKeeCalvin Rowe

item.title: Grammy Award-Winning Irvin Mayfield's Music Church
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-07-30T22:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/
Irvin Mayfield is a Billboard and two-time Grammy Award- winning artist, composer, and producer. His 30+ record discography and published written works keynote three decades of world-tours, recorded performances, and collaborations with distinguished artists such as Stevie Wonder, Bob Weir, Frank Ocean, Aaron Neville, Wynton Marsalis, and Trombone Shorty.
A humanist born, raised, and presently residing in New Orleans, LA, Mayfield espouses a daily practice of constant reimagination in his community. His upcoming recording and live performance projects engage global thought leadership edging on the frontiers of art, media, technology and beauty.
9PM
Special Guests announced weekly.
Reserved Seating $25

item.title: FREE monthly line dance classes at The Blue Crab! All skill levels welcome. Hip-hop, country, R&B, zydeco & NOLA classics. Just bring water & dancing spirit!
item.description:
Venue: The Blue Crab Starts: 2026-08-15T10:00:00.000-05:00 Ends: 2026-08-15T11:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: Theater, Stage & Dance More info: https://local.aarp.org/new-orleans-la/aarp-events/
Get your weekend started right with AARP Louisiana's "Movin' and Groovin'" - a free monthly outdoor line dance class at The Blue Crab's scenic lower patio! Perfect for all skill levels, these energetic sessions feature diverse music including hip-hop, country, R&B, zydeco, and New Orleans classics. No experience needed - bring comfortable clothes, water, and your dancing spirit! All ages welcome!
Please sign up here: https://local.aarp.org/new-orleans-la/aarp-events/
Address: 7900 Lakeshore Dr, New Orleans, LA 70124
Time: 10 am - 11 am
Dates:
-Saturday, September 20
-Saturday, October 18
-Saturday, November 15
-Saturday, December 20
-Third Saturday of the Month

item.title: A monthly spectacle featuring the biggest and best from New Orleans' finest entertainers and special guests from around the world including circus acts, Burlesque Dancers, Magic, and sideshow stunts!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-08-21T20:00:00.000-05:00 Ends: 2026-08-21T21:30:00.000-05:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: bigdamnshow.eventbrite.com Tickets: bigdamnshow.eventbrite.com
The Big Damn Show began as a One Night Only event that, by popular demand, is now a monthly revue show. The show is hosted and produced by JuJu and Odd Corey, a magic and sideshow duo specializing in hilariously strange and bizarre magic and dangerous stunts like fire eating and sword swallowing. Every month features multiple special guests ranging from knife throwers to burlesque dancers and drag performers.

item.description:

SUBSCRIBE TO OFFBEAT.COM to get the most comprehensive info on New Orleans and Louisiana music. A subscription allows you to access our 37+ years of stories, reviews, interviews, music and cultural history and more on New Orleans and Louisiana music, musicians, festivals and events.

item.title: Bruno Mars bring the The Romantic Tour to New Orleans on September 16 with special guests Anderson .Paak as DJ Pee .Wee and Raye.
item.description:
Venue: Caesars Superdome Starts: 2026-09-16T20:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.caesarssuperdome.com/events/detail/bruno-mars Tickets: https://www.ticketmaster.com/bruno-mars-the-romantic-tour-new-orleans-louisiana-09-16-2026/event/1B006390992596F2
Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach 1 billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and 7 MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

item.title: A monthly spectacle featuring the biggest and best from New Orleans' finest entertainers and special guests from around the world including circus acts, Burlesque Dancers, Magic, and sideshow stunts!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-09-18T21:00:00.000-04:00 Ends: 2026-09-18T22:30:00.000-04:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: bigdamnshow.eventbrite.com Tickets: bigdamnshow.eventbrite.com
The Big Damn Show began as a One Night Only event that, by popular demand, is now a monthly revue show. The show is hosted and produced by JuJu and Odd Corey, a magic and sideshow duo specializing in hilariously strange and bizarre magic and dangerous stunts like fire eating and sword swallowing. Every month features multiple special guests ranging from knife throwers to burlesque dancers and drag performers.

item.title: Parcels
item.description:
Venue: The Saenger Theatre Starts: 2026-10-10T20:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover Tickets: https://tickets-center.com/tickets/v/Saenger-Theatre-LA/1486/e/Trombone-Shorty-and-Orleans-Avenue/5515975/?eventId=5515975&eventName=Trombone+Shorty+and+Orleans+Avenue&venueName=Saenger+Theatre-LA&venueId=1486&eventDateTime=04%2f26%2f2025+20%3a00%3a00&city=New+Orleans&stateProvince=LA&performerId=14068&performerName=Trombone+Shorty&cid=71880695297860&nid=2&accid=140078697&campaignid=376233297&adgroupid=1150089825077036&wsvar=2-71880695297860+%5bmsclkid%7c5988a98f92aa12c8febace4da8588639%5d+(ag%7c1150089825077036)+(uuid%7c9812390046cf4e7fb2228bdd21244e96)&msclkid=5988a98f92aa12c8febace4da8588639&device=c&ismobile=false&loc_physical_ms=73523&referer=https%3a%2f%2fwww.bing.com%2f&vx=0
Today, Australian-born, Berlin-based quintet Parcels are announcing new U.S. and Mexico tour dates. The tour is an extension of last year’s run of North American Arena tour in support of the band’s critically acclaimed album LOVED. With the announcement, the band has unveiled a brand new live session of album track “Ifyoucall.”

item.title: A monthly spectacle featuring the biggest and best from New Orleans' finest entertainers and special guests from around the world including circus acts, Burlesque Dancers, Magic, and sideshow stunts!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-10-16T20:00:00.000-05:00 Ends: 2026-10-16T21:30:00.000-05:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: bigdamnshow.eventbrite.com Tickets: bigdamnshow.eventbrite.com
The Big Damn Show began as a One Night Only event that, by popular demand, is now a monthly revue show. The show is hosted and produced by JuJu and Odd Corey, a magic and sideshow duo specializing in hilariously strange and bizarre magic and dangerous stunts like fire eating and sword swallowing. Every month features multiple special guests ranging from knife throwers to burlesque dancers and drag performers.

The First Wednesday of every month
&
The Third Saturday of every month
$10 at the door

item.title: Bingo like you've never played before! Full of bad jokes, Strip Tease, AND prizes Lefty Lucy’s Burlesque Bingo is a whirlwind of wholesome good times blended with the cheeky sass of Burlesque!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-10-21T19:30:00.000-04:00 More info: burlesquebingonola.eventbrite.com Tickets: www.burlesquebingonola.eventbrite.com
LEFTY LUCY’S BURLESQUE BINGO features 3 rounds of Bingo with PRIZES EVERY ROUND — including a New Orleans Gift Set with a free shot, PLUS Lefty Lucy dances to a song the winner selects!
GRAND FINALE PRIZE from GLAM JAM plus gifts from local pop-ups!
But wait—there's more!
#EATLOCAL with a New Orleans/Korean Fusion pop-up from NOLA SNACK BAE offering delicious and unique dishes while you play!
This ain’t your Grandma’s Bingo —
but Grandma will love it!

item.title: The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal
item.description:
Venue: Poor Boys Starts: 2026-10-22T18:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Comedy More info: https://www.facebook.com/share/14T5Mey6Nit/ Tickets: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/gumbolaya-the-magic-mic-tickets-1980178041828?aff=ebdsshcopyurl&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=listing&utm-source=cp
The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal limits welcome to bring your flavor! Sometimes there's prizes, sometimes there's positive surprises in the mix. There's always fun! It's free, but buy 2 drinks dammit! Pull up, turn up, laugh and savor the flavor of the authentic New Orleans experience! Sign up at 9 start at 9:30. See less

item.title: Experience the elegant world of Burlesque...with a TWIST. Champagne and Showgirls are waiting for you at The Allways Lounge & Cabaret!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge Starts: 2026-11-06T23:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: https://Burlesquewithatwist.eventbrite.com Tickets: https://Burlesquewithatwist.eventbrite.com
One of the most beloved Burlesque Shows in New Orleans!
Class: A Classic New Orleans Burlesque Show with a Twist is where you learn the true meaning of "Entertainment!"
Unforgettable, jaw-dropping performances! Dazzling Costumes! Champagne, and Showgirls!
Then after intermission, we turn up the heat, and reveal the twist!
Limited seating!
Get your tickets before they sell out!
Experience the elegant world of Burlesque at the Allways Lounge & Cabaret!
Doors 10pm, Show 10:30pm
Don't forget your dollar bills to throw on stage!!
www.Prettieboi.com for tickets
The Allways Lounge & Cabaret
This is a 21+ event
RSVP REQUIRED
NO REFUNDS
Prettieboishowcase@gmail.com

item.title: Immerse yourself in a surreal evening of burlesque & performance art filled with untold delights, vibrant colors & outrageous acts!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-11-13T23:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: www.audaciousnola.com/tickets Tickets: https://PsychedelicSpeakeasyBurlesque.eventbrite.com
Audacious NOLA presents:
PSYCHEDELIC SPEAKEASY!
Immerse yourself in a surreal evening of burlesque and performance art filled with untold delights, vibrant colors, wild sensations and outrageous acts! Each month features a new cast and a new show in the Twilight Room at AllWays Lounge & Cabaret.
Colorful and neon attire is highly encouraged!
-Tipping highly encouraged
Doors 10pm, show 10:30pm
N﻿OTE FOR VIP TICKETS: Group parties reserving VIP tickets *must* purchase as a group under one single name in order to be seated together.
This is a 21+ event, ID required
RSVP REQUIRED
NO REFUNDS
hello@audaciousnola.com
www.audaciousnola.com

Venue: Poor Boys Starts: 2026-12-24T18:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: Comedy More info: https://www.facebook.com/share/14T5Mey6Nit/ Tickets: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/gumbolaya-the-magic-mic-tickets-1980178041828?aff=ebdsshcopyurl&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=listing&utm-source=cp
The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal limits welcome to bring your flavor! Sometimes there's prizes, sometimes there's positive surprises in the mix. There's always fun! It's free, but buy 2 drinks dammit! Pull up, turn up, laugh and savor the flavor of the authentic New Orleans experience! Sign up at 9 start at 9:30. See less

item.title: Bingo like you've never played before! Full of bad jokes, Strip Tease, AND prizes Lefty Lucy’s Burlesque Bingo is a whirlwind of wholesome good times blended with the cheeky sass of Burlesque!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-12-30T19:30:00.000-05:00 More info: burlesquebingonola.eventbrite.com Tickets: www.burlesquebingonola.eventbrite.com
LEFTY LUCY’S BURLESQUE BINGO features 3 rounds of Bingo with PRIZES EVERY ROUND — including a New Orleans Gift Set with a free shot, PLUS Lefty Lucy dances to a song the winner selects!
GRAND FINALE PRIZE from GLAM JAM plus gifts from local pop-ups!
But wait—there's more!
#EATLOCAL with a New Orleans/Korean Fusion pop-up from NOLA SNACK BAE offering delicious and unique dishes while you play!
This ain’t your Grandma’s Bingo —
but Grandma will love it!

item.title: Laughing Jack's Presents: "Humpday HiJenks" Comedy Open Mic at One More Pie in the French Quarter where the French Market meets Jackson Square. Hosted By: Jackie Jenkins Jr.
item.description:
Venue: One More Pie Starts: 2026-12-30T20:00:00.000-07:00 Ends: 2026-12-30T22:00:00.000-07:00 Categories: Comedy More info: Laughin Jack's Productions, LLC Presents: Humpday HiJenks - 504Comedy https://share.google/nqbblGCq5hJS4cPjZ
Ready to get over that midweek slump? Laughing Jack's Presents: "Humpday HiJenks" is the perfect way to do it! Join us at One More Pie in the French Quarter where the French Market meets Jackson Square for an Open Mic comedy show, hosted by the hilarious Jackie Jenkins Jr. Grab a seat, enjoy half-off pizza specials, and get ready for a night of laughs.
